changes: No new Tier 1 or adjacent benchmark release landed in the latest scan window.
PicoClaw posted a fresh nightly build at 2026-04-10 03:30 UTC, but its latest stable release is still v0.2.6.
Hermes Agent did not cut a new release, but its README now explicitly documents Android / Termux support in the install path.
The broader atlas structure is unchanged today: the monitored set, taxonomy, and executive read still hold.
whyItMatters: This is incremental product motion, not a category-shaping move.
PicoClaw's nightly cadence still reinforces the fast-moving edge and low-resource lane.
Hermes broadening the documented install story to Android nudges it a bit further toward portable, always-available personal-agent positioning.
Net: the ecosystem is still active, but nothing materially new happened today.
